raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I purchased online XXXX XXXX of Best Buy XXXX order # XXXX Amount {$180.00}. I was told to expect delivery on XXXX. Then I received a text saying that it was coming earlier on XXXX. Then I received a text saying that it would be delivered XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, nothing came so I called Best Buy customer support, who gave me a XXXX  XXXX number to call- and that was wrong. It was supposed to be delivered by XXXX. I called them and they told me that they did not have a record of the order. So I called Best Buy back and asked them to please cancel the order. The agent said they could deliver by XX/XX/XXXX and I said no. I want a refund and cancel the order. He said ok. you should receive a credit in about XXXX to XXXX  days. I have not. So I wrote to XXXX XXXX XXXX and they said that they would investigate. It is not almost 30 days since I canceled the order and XXXX XXXX XXXX have not sent XXXX word or anything other than that they are investigating. How hard can it be to track the order and verify that it was never delivered. I bought a cheaper microwave from XXXX.
